title: AI SMASHES Benchmarks! Fable 5.5 LEAVES Codex in Dust! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof reports that Fable 5.0 and GPT 5.5 demonstrate superior performance on benchmarks for agentic coding and knowledge tasks compared to competitors like Codex. The video frames these results as groundbreaking developments in AI capability.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof reports benchmark results placing Fable 5.0 and GPT 5.5 ahead of competitors such as Codex on agentic coding and knowledge tasks. The framing centers on benchmark performance as the measure of capability, with the two models presented as leading on these tests. The takeaway is narrow: claimed benchmark wins for Fable 5.0 and GPT 5.5 over Codex, presented as a significant development in AI.
